title: Answer the user's action instead of atmosphere

messages.text: Will had just offered to explain the chalk-drawn portal while everyone stayed seated.

pendingUserMessage: O'Neill asks Will exactly why they should trust his transport method.

editorialRedirect.sourceResponse: Rain dimmed the diner windows while the waitress topped up a nearby coffee cup. The room stayed quiet.
editorialRedirect.replacementObjective: Make the turn respond to O'Neill's trust challenge.
requiredBeats: Will or the team directly engages the risk of trusting the transport method.
forbiddenSourceBeats: Spend the response only on diner atmosphere without answering the challenge.
